scenario_families.purpose: Refactor the hosted controller into reusable public workflow helpers for multi-scenario graph runs.
expected_evidence: workspace creation
product descriptor imports by document
approval queue and detail traversal
claim returns run_id used by start execute and advance
current graph readback

scenario_families.public_boundary: hosted-cpk-server-http-mcp plus HTTP request to router
scenario_families.purpose: Deploy hello-blue behind active router, then transition router active edge to hello-green.
expected_evidence: ACTIVE_TARGET_URL is derived from the graph edge
blue response observed through router before transition
green response observed through router after transition
current graph advances only after accepted execution
known_gaps: Hosted helper must instantiate hello-server with per-instance HELLO_MESSAGE values; core already allows changing values for existing public environment keys.

scenario_families.public_boundary: hosted-cpk-server-http-mcp plus HTTP request to multiplexer
scenario_families.purpose: Prove primary response wins and observer receives copied request.
expected_evidence: MULTIPLEXER_PRIMARY_URL is derived from the primary graph edge
MULTIPLEXER_OBSERVER_A_URL is derived from the observer graph edge
primary response is returned to caller
observer delivery is visible through package-owned evidence
known_gaps: The current hello-server product returns a response but does not expose request receipt counts or last request evidence; multiplexer product unit tests prove observer delivery with an in-process recording server, but hosted seeded stress needs product-owned live evidence.

scenario_families.purpose: Prove retained Postgres data-service descriptor behavior through real Docker realization.
expected_evidence: ProductFamily.DATA_SERVICE
POSTGRES_PASSWORD delivered from secret reference at IO boundary
retained postgres-data mount recorded distinctly from ephemeral compute
select-one readiness succeeds
retained data is not removed by ordinary ephemeral cleanup

scenario_families.public_boundary: public cpk-server route errors plus Docker residue audit
scenario_families.purpose: Prove fail-closed graph/product/security cases and scoped cleanup.
expected_evidence: unregistered product rejected
incompatible socket rejected
missing private pull authority fails before Docker mutation
failed readiness blocks advancement with visible evidence
missing or rejected approval prevents admission
stale current graph prevents admission or advancement
unauthorized mutation returns bounded 401 or 403
foreign resources are not touched

topology_decision.reason: Multiplexer observer delivery cannot be honestly proven through live seeded products until a package-owned observer-visible endpoint or equivalent bounded evidence exists.

non_goals: child cpk-server graph or activity inspection
product-specific branches in core or operations
